value:
v1.13.0 SHIPPED 2026-04-23 (tag 9e8f98c). Release recovery narrative: initial workflow hit "Error creating policy" from softprops/action-gh-release@v3, Windows artifact dropped + release stuck in draft. Manual recovery: Windows uploaded, draft published, Homebrew formula pushed by hand. #95 closed with v2.6.2 pin-back in 3530787.

TEST COUNT: 1325 (up from 1269). New tools/surfaces: ccli topology, ccli lint --seed-quality, context.next_session banner in codex_context, CCLI_PASSWORD / --password-file for encrypted-entry scripting.

v1.14.0 IN PHASE 1 (SOAK). Plan lives in project.v114Plan — read that for phased detail, acceptance signals, theme candidates, and anti-pattern warnings. Milestone has 12 candidates awaiting Phase 2 theme pick (~2026-05-14).

#96 SHIPPED 2026-04-28 via PR #98: re-pinned action-gh-release@v3.0.0 with continue-on-error attempt 1 + if:failure() retry. v1.13.0 transient could not be reproduced on a debug-tag rerun. Phase 4 CI is now empty for v1.14.0. See context.v113PolicyIncident for full diagnostic narrative + recurrence playbook.

DOGFOODING: docs/dogfooding-real-usage.md (part two + closure addendum) live alongside v1.13.0. Part three expected with v1.14.0.

NEXT SESSION LIKELY PICKS UP: nothing code-wise during soak. If a week or two has passed since 2026-04-23, dataset mine is ripe — see project.v114Plan Phase 1 exit criteria. If earlier, leave v1.13.0 running and work on unrelated items.
